name: Tortellini with Garden Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Carrot, peeled and thinly sliced
1 tbsp Fresh Basil or Parsley, minced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, bring 6 cups of water to a rolling boil. Add pasta and cook 8 to 10 minutes or until tender. Reserve 1/3 cup cooking liquid; drain pasta.
2. Meanwhile, heat olive oil over low heat in a 12-inch skillet for one minute. Add carrot and zucchini and gently sauté for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Mix in tomato and peas; cook for an additional 5 minutes.
4. Add the pasta, reserved cooking liquid, and remaining ingredients. Toss to combine and heat through about 1 minute.
5. Serve with additional Parmesan cheese on the side.
